description: Java Spring Boot REST controller for managing supporting documents, including upload, list, download, update metadata, and delete operations, secured with JWT authentication.

classes.name: SupportingDocumentController
classes.description: REST controller for supporting document operations secured with JWT, handling upload, listing, download, metadata update, and deletion.

methods.name: upload
methods.description: Handles uploading a supporting document, associating it with a user and optional draft ID, and saving metadata.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists documents belonging to the authenticated user, optionally filtered by draft ID.

methods.name: updateMetadata
methods.description: Replaces metadata for a specified document owned by the user.

methods.name: download
methods.description: Downloads the raw bytes of a specified document if owned by the user.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a specified document and its metadata if owned by the user.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts and validates the user UUID from the Authentication object.
